info.name: HITProduct API
info.description:
API collection for HITProduct backend.

Base URL: {{baseUrl}}

Auth dung httpOnly cookie cho refreshToken:
- Register/Login: server tra ve { accessToken } trong body, va dat refreshToken vao cookie (Set-Cookie, HttpOnly, path=/api/v1/auth).
- Postman tu luu cookie vao cookie jar va tu gui lai o cac request cung domain. Khong can tu nhap refreshToken.
- Refresh/Logout: KHONG can body, server doc refreshToken tu cookie.
- Logout All: can header Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}.

Workflow:
1. Register hoac Login -> accessToken tu dong luu vao bien collection, refreshToken nam trong cookie jar.
2. Dung accessToken cho cac route can xac thuc.
3. Khi accessToken het han, goi Refresh Token (cookie tu gui) de lay accessToken moi.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Cac endpoint xac thuc nguoi dung: dang ky, dang nhap, lam moi token, dang xuat. refreshToken duoc quan ly qua httpOnly cookie.

request.description:
Dang ky tai khoan moi. Dang ky xong la dang nhap luon (issue tokens + tao session).

**Validation:**
- `email`: bat buoc, phai la email hop le
- `password`: bat buoc, toi thieu 6 ky tu
- `displayName`: bat buoc, khong duoc de trong

**Response 201:**
```json
{
  "statusCode": 201,
  "message": "Dang ky thanh cong.",
  "data": { "accessToken": "<jwt>" }
}
```
Header tra ve co `Set-Cookie: refreshToken=...; HttpOnly; Path=/api/v1/auth`.

**Errors:**
- `400`: Validation that bai
- `409`: Email da ton tai

exec: pm.test("Body chi co accessToken (khong lo refreshToken)", () => {

request.description:
Dang nhap. Body tra ve accessToken, refreshToken nam trong httpOnly cookie.

Script tu dong luu `accessToken` vao bien collection.

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "statusCode": 200,
  "message": "Dang nhap thanh cong.",
  "data": { "accessToken": "<jwt>" }
}
```

**Errors:**
- `400`: Validation that bai
- `401`: Email hoac mat khau khong dung

exec: pm.test("Co accessToken, khong co refreshToken trong body", () => {

request.description:
Lay accessToken moi khi accessToken het han. KHONG can body: server doc refreshToken tu cookie (Postman tu gui cookie).

Ap dung token rotation: refreshToken cu bi vo hieu, cookie duoc cap moi qua Set-Cookie.

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "statusCode": 200,
  "message": "Cap token moi thanh cong.",
  "data": { "accessToken": "<jwt_moi>" }
}
```

**Errors:**
- `401`: Thieu cookie / token khong hop le / het han / session khong ton tai

exec: console.log('accessToken moi da duoc cap nhat.');

request.description:
Dang xuat khoi thiet bi hien tai. KHONG can body: server doc refreshToken tu cookie, xoa session tuong ung va clear cookie.

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "statusCode": 200,
  "message": "Dang xuat thanh cong."
}
```

exec: console.log('accessToken da duoc xoa khoi bien.');

request.description:
Dang xuat khoi TAT CA thiet bi (xoa toan bo session cua nguoi dung) va clear cookie.

**Yeu cau xac thuc:** `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "statusCode": 200,
  "message": "Dang xuat tat ca thiet bi thanh cong."
}
```

**Errors:**
- `401`: Thieu hoac accessToken khong hop le / het han

exec: console.log('Tat ca tokens da duoc xoa.');

item.name: Users
item.description: Cac endpoint lien quan den nguoi dung.

request.description:
Endpoint mau (placeholder). Khong co logic thuc su.

**Response 200:**
